name: @trembus-templates/pages
description: Copy-and-own reference PAGE templates (AppShell, WorkflowBoard). NOT a library: no 3-jobs contracts; off the validate gate via off-gate script names (tc). Stories DO join build:storybook + test:stories via the root glob. Full check: `pnpm templates:check` from the root. Each template's version lives in its template.json manifest, not here.
